Code Examples

Inline Code

Use const x = 5 to declare a constant.

Code Block


function hello() {
  console.log("Hello, World!");
}

Python Code


def greet(name):
    print(f"Hello, {name}!")

Code Without Language


Some code without language

Emphasis Examples

This is bold text and this is italic text.

You can also use b tags and i tags.

Blockquote

This is a blockquote with important text.
